MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, L. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE DIANE E. WICK, CLERK V. DAVIS, NOT REPORTED C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BY THOMAS WRIGHT, JR, DEFT. IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. STIP FILED W/COURT. NOT ON RECORD. PLAINTIFF PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, DAYLON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POLK STREET #402, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $570.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. IS TO PAY THE SUM OF $95 P/MO STARTING JULY 25, 1994. CONTINUING ON THE 25TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDG- MENT UPON FINAL PAYMENT.
